news.summary: On April 18, 2025, Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT) disclosed the postponement of the record date for the spin-off and allocation of Caring Brands, Inc. (“CABR”) common stock. The original record date of April 7, 2025, has been rescheduled. Caring Brands Common Stock, with a par value of $0.0001 per share, will now be distributed at a later date, which will be announced by the company. Safety Shot aims to ensure a smooth transition for stakeholders during this process.
news.headline: Safety Shot, Inc. postpones spin-off record date for distribution of Caring Brands Common Stock from April 7 due to unforeseen circumstances.

news.summary: Today, Monroe Capital Corporation, traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MRCC, disclosed its plan to release its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. This announcement was made in Chicago on April 18, 2025, through a press release. The Company has scheduled the report to be published after the financial markets close on the specified date.
news.headline: Monroe Capital Corp to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025 after market close. (NASDAQ: MRCC)
Tesla to delay US production of cheaper Model Y, according to sources. $TSLA

news.summary: Tokenized stocks are projected to exceed $1 trillion in market capitalization in the coming years as adoption accelerates, according to industry executives at the TokenizeThis conference in New York. As of April 18, tokenized stocks account for around $350 million in cumulative market capitalization, only a small portion of the total RWA market worth over $18 billion. However, there is potential for growth as tokenized stocks capture a larger share of the US equities market, which has an aggregate value of over $50 trillion. Tokenized US Treasury Bills are also in high demand, with nearly $6 billion in total market cap. Overall, tokenized RWAs present a $30 trillion market opportunity globally. Coinbase is considering offering tokenized shares of its stock on Base, its Ethereum layer-2 network. Ultimately, tokenization could become the preferred choice for investors if it offers better user experience, speed, and cost efficiency.
news.headline: Tokenized stocks forecasted to surpass $1T market cap, driven by increasing adoption. As of April 18, tokenized stocks valued at $350M in total, a fraction of the $18B RWA market. US equities market worth over $50T. Tokenization offers rapid, cost-effective exposure to these markets, with US Treasury Bills attracting high demand. Tokenized RWAs globally present a $30T market opportunity. Magazine discusses SEC's stance on crypto-related matters.

news.summary: In Boise, Idaho, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) declared the debut of three new communities in Nampa: Enclave, Traditions, and Reserve at Reflections Edge. These properties cater to contemporary living preferences, featuring modern kitchens, spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage. The homes encompass one to two stories, marking KB Home’s expansion in the U.S. real estate market.
news.headline: KB Home opens 3 new communities in prime Nampa, Idaho location, offering modern homes designed for today's living.

news.summary: KB Home, a prominent U.S. homebuilder listed on NYSE as KBH, recently unveiled a new gated community named Briscoe in North Las Vegas. The new residences cater to contemporary living needs, incorporating modern kitchens, spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage options. Briscoe comprises one- and two-story homes with a capacity of up to five bedrooms and four bathrooms. This development is strategically situated in a sought-after location to meet market demand.
news.headline: KB Home opens new gated community "Briscoe" in North Las Vegas; homes feature modern kitchens, up to 5 bedrooms.

news.summary: Meritage Hospitality Group Inc., a leading franchise operator based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, announced its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 30, 2025. The company, listed on OTCQX as MHGU, shared its quarterly results.
news.headline: Meritage Hospitality Group Inc. reports Q1 2025 results in Grand Rapids; reaffirms full-year 2025 earnings outlook. OT: OTCQX: MHGU.

news.summary: Encompass Health Corp. revealed initial plans on April 18, 2025, to construct a new freestanding inpatient rehabilitation hospital in St. George, Utah. The facility is set to have 50 beds and is part of the company's strategy to expand services in the region. This move aligns with Encompass Health's mission to provide enhanced healthcare access to communities. The hospital is anticipated to cater to a significant number of patients and address the growing demand for rehabilitation services in St. George. This development signifies a substantial investment by Encompass Health in advancing healthcare infrastructure, aiming to meet the healthcare needs of the population.
news.headline: Encompass Health to build 50-bed rehab hospital in St. George, Utah - preliminary plans announced in April 2025.

news.summary: Reported on April 18, 2025 in Shanghai, FinVolution Group, a prominent fintech platform operating in China, Indonesia, and the Philippines, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the financial year concluding on December 31, 2024. Traded under the ticker symbol FINV on the NYSE, the company continues to expand its presence in the region, reflecting its strong performance and commitment to growth in the financial technology sector.
news.headline: FinVolution Group files 2024 annual report on Form 20-F; leading fintech in China, Indonesia, Philippines.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, in San Francisco, genetic and biotechnology company 23andMe Holding Co. disclosed details regarding customer data protection during the sale of its assets under court supervision. The Special Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors is overseeing the process, which involves assessing acquisition bids. The U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Eastern District of Missouri is monitoring the proceedings as an impartial entity that needs to authorize any deals. 23andMe is listed as MEHCQ on the OTC market.
news.headline: 23andMe updates about court-supervised sale process, protects customer data. Process overseen by US Bankruptcy Court.

news.summary: Integra LifeSciences Holdings Corporation, a prominent medical technology company traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IART, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, May 5, 2025, before the market commences trading. Alongside this disclosure, Integra's executives will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. This event offers investors and stakeholders an insight into the company's recent financial standing and strategic outlook for the future.
news.headline: Integra LifeSciences (NASDAQ: IART) to release first quarter 2025 financial results on May 5, with conference call at 8:30am ET.

news.summary: In recent findings, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 4.9% as of the latest data collected. This marks a slight increase from the previous month's rate of 4.7%. Additionally, the number of new jobs added to the economy fell short of expectations, with only 150,000 jobs created in the last month, compared to the forecasted 200,000. Economists are closely monitoring these trends to gauge the overall health of the labor market and its potential impact on the economy.
news.headline: New fiber coupling module Axon FL by Coherent allows versatile use in Mini2P applications.

news.summary: A court in Brazil has handed down a judgment against the individuals responsible for the cryptocurrency investment fraud involving Braiscompany, resulting in a total of 170 years of imprisonment for the perpetrators.
news.headline: Men in Brazil sentenced to a total of 170 years in prison for running a $190 million Bitcoin Ponzi scheme.

news.summary: Mesa Royalty Trust (NYSE: MTR) declared the Trust income distribution for April 2025, with unitholders of record by April 30 set to receive $0.025015971 per unit on July 31, 2025. The Trust obtained a total of $75,928 in income solely from properties in the New Mexico portion of the San Juan Basin, managed by Hilcorp San Juan LP. Notably, no income was generated within the same period.
news.headline: Mesa Royalty Trust reports trust income for April 2025: $0.025015971 per unit, $75,928 total received from San Juan Basin properties.

news.summary: A recent report states that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 3.8% in the month of May, which is the lowest it has been since April 2000. This decrease in unemployment follows the addition of 223,000 jobs in various sectors, exceeding expectations. The strong job growth in industries such as retail, healthcare, and construction has contributed to this positive trend. The data also shows an increase in hourly wages by 0.3% in May, making it a total of 2.7% increase over the past year. This rise in wages is seen as a promising development for workers in the country. The Federal Reserve is expected to take this positive economic data into account as they continue to consider future interest rate hikes.
news.headline: Bessent takes over as IRS Commissioner amid Musk power struggle, reports suggest.

news.summary: Renowned home fragrance brand Slatkin + Co. has partnered with Elton to introduce a new collection of products inspired by John's gardens. Following the success of their debut holiday collection sellout with QVC, this collaboration is highly anticipated. The launch will take place on April 18, 2025, in West Chester, Pennsylvania. This collection aims to offer a wide range of new, perfect products for home fragrance enthusiasts.
news.headline: Slatkin + Co. releases new fragrance collection with Elton John, following sellout debut. Collaboration inspired by singer's London home gardens. (Count: 132)

news.summary: In Novi, Michigan, on April 18, 2025, a company known as The Shyft Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SHYF) has established itself as a key player in specialty vehicle manufacturing in North America. They specialize in assembling and customizing vehicles for ecommerce-related parcel deliveries, along with other commercial, retail, and service sectors. The company's strong presence in the market is evident from its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: The Shyft Group announces Q1 2025 financial results conference call. Leader in specialty vehicle manufacturing.

news.summary: Chloeta, a top provider of engineering, scientific, and technical solutions for military, energy, homeland security, emergency preparedness, and critical infrastructure needs, has proudly obtained the ISO 9001 certification for its Quality Management System (QMS). This significant accomplishment highlights Chloeta's dedication to regulatory excellence and solidifies its status as a leading industry player. This certification underscores Chloeta's consistent commitment to upholding quality standards in its services.
news.headline: Chloeta attains ISO 9001 cert showing commitment to quality; leading provider of military, energy and homeland solutions.
US bank deposits fell to $18.082 tln from $18.121 trln in the prior week.

news.summary: AMCON Distributing Company, headquartered in Omaha, Nebraska and listed on NYSE American as DIT, a Convenience and Foodservice Distributor, disclosed a fully diluted loss per share amounting to $2.58 for its second fiscal quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The net loss available to common shareholders totaled $1.6 million during this period. The Company acknowledged the persisting difficulties in the convenience retailing sector it operates in, attributing it to sluggish consumer behavior and reduced discretionary spending.
news.headline: AMCON Distributing Co. reports a loss of $2.58 per share, $1.6M net loss for Q2 ending March 31, 2025. Sector faces challenges.

news.summary: Xperi Inc., a company traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol XPER, specializing in entertainment technology innovations, will reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 7, 2025. The announcement will be made after the market closes. An earnings conference call is scheduled for 2 p.m. PST (5 p.m. EST) on the same day. For U.S. callers interested in joining the call, a toll-free line will be available.
news.headline: Xperi Inc. to release Q1 2025 results on May 7, 2025, with an earnings call at 2 p.m. PST. Stock listed on NYSE: XPER.

news.summary: Legal firm Nachawati Law Group, with a team advocating for over 5,000 cancer victims, is actively exploring various legal avenues. Despite a recent setback in court, where a federal judge dismissed a motion, the dedicated team remains committed to pursuing justice for their clients.
news.headline: Trial lawyers vow to continue fight for justice for over 5,000 cancer victims after a failed talc-cancer settlement.

news.summary: In the past few months, a surge of AI-generated content resembling the beloved Studio Ghibli's distinct style has dominated social media platforms like TikTok and Instagram. This trend has transformed ordinary images into enchanting, anime-inspired creations. Capitalizing on this wave, iMyFone Novi AI, a no-cost AI video editing platform, has seen a significant increase in user engagement and creations.
news.headline: Novi AI introduces Ghibli-style video generator creating animated masterpieces on TikTok and Instagram.

news.summary: Evolus, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ as EOLS and based in Newport Beach, California, has recently disclosed the issuance of a total of 30,579 restricted stock units (RSUs) in April. These RSUs were given to a group of 13 new non-executive employees. The distribution of the stock units was sanctioned by the compensation committee of Evolus' board of directors under the company’s 2023 Inducement Incentive Plan. This move aims to incentivize and retain key talent within the organization.
news.headline: Evolus granted 30,579 RSUs to 13 new non-executive employees under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) - Business Wire.

news.summary: Indianapolis, April 18, 2025 - Allison Transmission Holdings Inc., listed as ALSN on the New York Stock Exchange, is a top company known for creating traditional and electric vehicle propulsion systems. They are recognized as the primary producer of medium- and heavy-duty fully automatic transmissions worldwide.
news.headline: Allison Transmission (NYSE: ALSN) sets Q1 2025 earnings call. Leading designer of vehicle propulsion solutions.
Sify releases FY 2024-25 Consolidated Financial Results.

news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Fluence Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: FLNC), revealed plans to declare its earnings for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, on May 7, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to be made post-market close on that day.
news.headline: Fluence Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: FLNC) to report Q2 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025, after market close.
Morningstar DBRS confirms Italy at BBB, positive trend.

news.summary: New Port Richey, Florida, April 18, 2025 - Zeo Energy Corp. (Nasdaq: ZEO) disclosed today that it was notified by Nasdaq on April 17, 2025, about its non-compliance with periodic filing requirements under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). The company failed to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, with the SEC by the mandated deadline of March 31, 2025. This puts Zeo Energy at risk of losing its listing on the Nasdaq exchange.
news.headline: Zeo Energy Corp. (Nasdaq: ZEO) late in filing its Form 10-K for the year ended Dec 31, 2024; received Nasdaq notice.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, CNFinance Holdings Limited (NYSE: CNF), a prominent Chinese home equity loan service provider, disclosed receiving a notification from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) on April 7, 2025...
news.headline: CNFinance Holdings Limited notified of NYSE trading price requirement, received letter on April 7, 2025.

news.summary: The US Federal Reserve, led by Jerome Powell, is prepared to take decisive action to prevent a financial crisis, even amidst uncertainties like the US-led trade war. Last month, the Fed started easing financial conditions by reducing the redemption cap on Treasurys. This impacts global markets and cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin. Boston Fed President Susan Collins assured that the central bank could intervene to address liquidity issues if necessary. The approval of options trading for Ethereum ETFs is seen as a significant step to attract institutional capital. Canadian regulators have also approved staked Solana ETFs. Bitdeer, a Bitcoin mining company, is expanding its self-mining capacity in the US due to concerns over the trade war disrupting global supply chains. US President Trump's sons are investing in Bitcoin mining, aligning with the administration's focus on 'made in America' Bitcoin. Fed's next rate decision in June has a 67.5% likelihood of a cut. This week’s developments are highlighted in the Crypto Biz newsletter.
news.headline: US Fed under Powell gearing up to avoid crisis, eases policy with hints of potential rate cut. SEC approves options for spot ETH ETFs and Canada rolls out Solana staking ETFs. Bitdeer shifts focus to self-mining amid trade war concerns.

news.summary: The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) hit a rare spike to 60 on April 7, signaling extreme market fear and uncertainty. This has only occurred five times in the last 35 years. Dan Tapiero, CEO of 10Tfund, believes this spike suggests a rebound for risk assets like Bitcoin in 6 to 12 months. The VIX is a "fear gauge" based on S&P 500 options trading, and spikes in 2008 and 2020 coincided with market bottoms. Julien Bittel of Global Macro Investor also supports Tapiero's claim, noting that tech stocks are oversold, similar to the 2008 financial crisis and the 2020 pandemic. The recent VIX spike indicates peak uncertainty, leading to fear among investors. The American Association of Individual Investors survey reflects high levels of bearish sentiment, similar to levels seen during past market bottoms. Despite potential bullish outcomes for risk assets, market analyst Tony Severino warns that the Bitcoin/VIX ratio may lead to a bear market. Bitcoin's peak may have occurred already, but this could change by the end of April. Severino's analysis suggests bearish conditions based on the Elliott Wave theory, indicating it is too early to predict a bullish turn for Bitcoin based on the VIX correlation. Readers are advised to conduct their research as investment decisions involve risks.
news.headline: Market fear spikes as VIX hits 60, pointing to possible Bitcoin surge in 6-12 months, says Dan Tapiero. Rare event seen only 5 times in 35 years.

news.summary: RBAZ Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Republic Bank of Arizona, reported a consolidated net income of $1,064,000, or $0.59 per share, for the quarter ended March 31, 2025, a 49% increase from the previous year. Total loans increased by 0.6% to $223,962,000, while total deposits decreased by 3.7% to $240,864,000, partly offset by new banking relationships totaling $8,956,000. Total borrowings were $15,965,000, including short-term advances of $10,000,000. Total interest income increased to $4,485,000, and the Bank remained "Well Capitalized" with a CBLR ratio of 11.62%. The Company will merge with Pima Federal Credit Union on May 2, 2025. This marks the end of RBAZ's 18-year history as the top performing bank in Arizona.
news.headline: RBAZ Bancorp's Q1 2025 net income at $1,064,000, up 49% YoY, with total loans at $223,962,000 and deposits at $240,864,000.

news.summary: On April 18, 2025, in Omaha, Nebraska, Western Capital Resources, Inc. reported the conclusion of its tender offer for shares of its Common Stock. The offer came to an end at 5:00 P.M. on April 17, 2025, New York City time.
news.headline: Western Capital Resources, Inc. has concluded its tender offer for Common Stock, which expired on April 17, 2025 at 5:00 P.M.

news.summary: Signature Brands, the parent company of PAAS, a leading Easter Egg Coloring brand, will be organizing Easter Egg and Cookie Decorating Stations at the White House Easter Egg Roll event on April 21st. The event is set to take place in Washington, D.C. and is expected to attract over 30,000 attendees. Signature Brands, LLC will be providing interactive decorating stations for both eggs and cookies, offering a fun and creative experience for visitors. This initiative aims to engage participants in festive activities and enhance the overall Easter celebration.
news.headline: Signature Brands, LLC to continue 30+ year tradition of Easter decorating at White House Egg Roll with decorating stations.

news.summary: Attorney General Kwame Raoul revealed today that $24 million from the 2023 Juul Labs settlement will be allocated to support the nation's largest nonprofit focused on youth vaping prevention. This funding will be used to launch the "EX Program" campaign statewide in an effort to combat the rise of youth vaping.
news.headline: Juul settlement funds will bring $24 million for national youth vaping prevention to Illinois, led by Attorney General Raoul.

news.summary: The renowned fundraising organization, Colossal, has launched its yearly initiative to honor mothers and raise funds for Children's Miracle Network Hospitals. Beginning on April 18, 2025, in Phoenix, the nation's leading professional fundraiser, Colossal, revealed the commencement of voting for its celebrated Super Mom Competition.
news.headline: "Vote now for 2025 Super Mom Competition by Colossal, supporting Children's Miracle Network Hospitals. PHOENIX, April 18, 2025."

news.summary: Boca Raton, Florida, April 18, 2025 - US Claims Capital, LLC ("US Claims") has issued a notification regarding a data breach that could impact the privacy of specific individuals' data. The company is taking proactive measures to address this event and is disclosing details on the matter.
news.headline: US Claims Capital, LLC is notifying about a data event potentially affecting individuals' privacy. Take immediate action.

news.summary: Sentiment towards risk turned negative on Wednesday afternoon following comments by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell linking increasing tariffs to higher inflation and slower economic growth. Powell stated that tariffs could have a more lasting impact on inflation than previously anticipated and the uncertainty surrounding current policies makes it challenging to assess the overall impact. Powell explicitly stated that the central bank has no plans to offset market losses, leading to a reassessment of expectations for immediate monetary support. This stance had a significant impact on Wall Street, particularly in relation to the belief in a potential "Fed put" to intervene during market declines. By 3:15 p.m. ET, the S&P 500, tracked by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), had fallen by 3.1% to 5,230 points, with chipmakers notably extending losses. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stocks plunge as Powell dismisses 'Fed put', gold surpasses Nasdaq. S&P 500 falls 3.1% to 5,230 points by 3:15pm.

news.summary: Illinois youth will benefit from $24 million allocated from the 2023 Juul Labs settlement to implement the EX Program and prevention curriculum. Attorney General Kwame Raoul revealed this initiative on April 18, 2025, aiming to decrease nicotine addiction and aid in cessation among the youth population in the state.
news.headline: IL to receive $24 million from Juul Labs settlement for youth vaping prevention programs, led by Truth Initiative.

news.summary: The Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessent, expressed his discontent to President Trump regarding the appointment of the acting commissioner without his awareness.
news.headline: IRS chief removed in conflict between Treasury's Bessent & Musk; Sec. Bessent informs Trump of unauthorized appointment.

news.summary: Fashion designer Conner Ives created a "Protect the Dolls" T-shirt to support a transgender cause. The shirt, worn by celebrities, quickly sold out online. The initiative has successfully raised funds for the cause amidst popularity.
news.headline: "Popular 'Protect the Dolls' tees by designer Conner Ives go viral, raising funds for trans cause. Celeb-endorsed, now sold out online."

news.summary: The first unlock event for the TRUMP token is set for April 18, releasing 40 million tokens, valued at $309 million, into circulation at a 90% discount from its peak. This represents 20% of the current circulating supply and could introduce volatility. The token has fluctuated between $7.46 and $7.83 in the past 24 hours, down 89.5% from its all-time high of $73.43. Over 800,000 wallets suffered losses totaling $2 billion after the token's value collapsed. The token's supply is mainly owned by Trump-affiliated organizations: CIC Digital LLC and Fight Fight Fight LLC own 80% of the tokens. The unlock event on April 18 is a large one-time release, with steadier unlocks planned afterwards. The emission schedule indicates that smaller unlocks will occur following this date. The token has generated controversy around conflicts of interest and insider trading concerns.
news.headline: TRUMP tokenholders face 90% loss from peak as 40M tokens unlock April 18, valued at $309M. Price swings $7.46-$7.83. CIC Digital & Fight Fight Fight own 80% supply. Losses estimated at $2B. Holders realize losses upon sale. Next unlocks will be steady. Trump's crypto ventures raise ethics questions.

news.summary: Starco Brands, Inc., based in Santa Monica, California, recently released a business update alongside its form 10-K filing for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, traded on OTCQB under the symbol STCB, specializes in creating and procuring innovative technologies and brands that inspire curiosity in daily life. Chairman & CEO Ross Sklar highlighted that the fourth quarter marked the culmination of a pivotal year marked by significant acquisitions and integration efforts.
news.headline: Starco Brands released 2024 results in fourth quarter and full year; CEO highlights transformative year.
CFTC Positions in the Week ended April 15th

news.summary: Scott Bessent, the Treasury Secretary, expressed his discontent to President Trump regarding the appointment of the acting commissioner, which had been made without his awareness.
news.headline: Treasury Secretary removes I.R.S. chief in dispute over appointment by Elon Musk; complaint lodged with President Trump.

news.summary: A recent report has indicated a significant increase in online shopping during the COVID-19 pandemic. The study revealed that online retail sales have surged by 75% compared to the previous year. This rise in online shopping can be attributed to the strict lockdown measures and social distancing protocols in place. The report also highlighted a notable shift towards e-commerce platforms, with a 60% increase in new online shoppers. Additionally, the data showed that the most popular categories for online purchases were electronics, home goods, and groceries. As more consumers turn to online shopping for their needs, experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months.
news.headline: US regulators have approved Capital One's acquisition of Discover in a deal worth billions.
UK's Chancellor Reeves advocates for deeper partnership with China - Telegraph.
UK's Chancellor Reeves: Cutting ties with China would be foolish -Telgraph

news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has introduced forex perpetual futures contracts to its Kraken Pro platform, offering exposure to global currency markets with 20x leverage and no expiry date. The first two contracts are euro-US dollar (EUR-USD) and British pound-US dollar (GBP-USD). Kraken previously added spot forex trading and signed a $1.5 billion deal to purchase NinjaTrader for offering crypto futures to US residents. It partnered with Mastercard for a crypto debit card and introduced stock and ETF trading in select US states. Kraken is eying a capital raise of up to $1 billion for a potential IPO in Q1 2026.
news.headline: Kraken now offers Forex perpetual futures with 20x leverage, including EUR-USD and GBP-USD contracts, expanding its financial product lineup.
